word: G488 - ἀντιμετρέω - antimetréō - an-tee-met-reh'-o - Measure again

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀντιμετρέω

- Transliteration: Antimetreo

- Phonetic: an-tee-met-reh'-o

- Definition:

1. to measure back, to measure in return, repay

- Origin: from G473 and G3354

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G473 and G3354; to mete in return: - measure again.
